name: Zeus / Zbot banking trojan (zeus.vmem)
description: Canonical Volatility Foundation public memory sample (Windows XP SP2 x86). Zeus/Zbot: code injected into winlogon.exe (PID 624) and svchost.exe (PID 856), C2 from svchost.exe to 193.104.41.75:80 (Moldova), HKLM\...\Winlogon Userinit persistence loading sdra64.exe, and Windows Firewall disabled.
source: Volatility Foundation public memory sample — zeus.vmem
